name: Vennominon the King of Poisonous Snakes
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>毒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蛇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヴェノミノン
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned by another Effect Monster's effect. Unaffected by "Venom Swamp". Gains 500 ATK for each Reptile monster in your GY. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can banish 1 other Reptile monster from your GY; Special Summon this card.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned by another Effect Monster's effect. Unaffected by "Venom Swamp". Gains 500 ATK for each Reptile monster in your GY. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can banish 1 other Reptile monster from your GY; Special Summon this card.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned by another Effect Monster's effect. Unaffected by "Venom Swamp". Gains 500 ATK for each Reptile monster in your GY. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can banish 1 other Reptile monster from your GY; Special Summon this card.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

summoning: Cannot be Special Summoned except by a specific method
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
